metadata.title: Quick 2v1 Mid Hold with Sharp Crosshair Placement in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how smart positioning and calm aim turn a tough 2v1 fight into a clean win. Timing and angles really made this clutch moment count.
What’s your favorite way to hold mid?
